title: Fever
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Defines pediatric fever assessment context and the importance of age, measurement site, appearance, persistence, and underlying disease.
presenting_history.rationale: Directly supports pediatric fever terminology, age, temperature, appearance, persistence, and underlying-condition context.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Defines pediatric fever assessment context and the importance of age, measurement site, appearance, persistence, and underlying disease.

red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines Dubai telehealth pediatric fever scope and emergency exclusions.

source_limitations: The baseline viral-fever diagnosis label and viral aliases remain unsupported unless clinician-stated.
Medication, antibiotic, hydration, sick-note, and fixed follow-up content is not promoted by this mapping.
The workflow is broader than DHA telehealth setting.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
